properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lately Lord, I almost feel like dyin' Wakeup like a child slowly cryin' Sometimes Lord, I just can't keep from cryin' I can't find the strength to carry on

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus it's me again Down on my knees again Asking you please again Reach out your hand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Time to time I try to find a reason To talk to you from time to time before But this time Lord Your Will is my command And I know I just can't take it anymore
